    🤖 Telegram Bot – Full Capabilities
    /trending
    Top 10 trending Solana tokens by volume
    /alerts <address> <price> [above|below]
    Set price alert – sends Telegram notification + sound
    /stopsound
    Stop the ringing beep/custom sound
    /add <address>
    Add token to your watchlist
    /remove <address>
    Remove from watchlist
    /watchlist
    View your tracked tokens
    🔊 Custom Alert Sound
    Upload any MP3/WAV – plays on price alerts
    /search <symbol>
    Find token address by symbol

    🚀 HVBS Token Roadmap & Overview • Deflationary Utility
    📊 Tokenomics & Burn Engine
    Total Supply: 1,000,000,000 (fixed, no mint)
    Buy Tax: 0%
    Sell Tax: 0% until $300M MC → 0.8% after
    Fee split (post-$300M):
    • 80% → Auto Buyback & Permanent Burn
    • 20% → 10% NGO Donations (community voted), 10% Team & Development
    🔥 Hyper-deflationary: supply decreases forever
    🏆 Daily Burn Competition
    Every 24h: wallet that burns the most HVBS wins.
    🎁 Reward: 50% of the tokens they personally burned during that period.
    🎵 Victory Feature: 20-second victory song on website (user can stop).
    ✨ Advanced: Winner can connect wallet & upload custom victory song (AI-filtered).
    🎯 Vision & Security First
    HVBS aims to become a trusted AI security layer for crypto traders: smart scanning, scam detection, automated alerts, community-driven deflation.
    ⚠️ Risk Disclaimer: Cryptocurrency investments carry high risk. HVBS is a utility token – not financial advice. Always DYOR.

    HVBS AI
    🌐 About HVBS AI

    HVBS AI is a cutting-edge Solana-based platform delivering real-time token data with precision, speed, and decentralization at its core. Built for modern crypto users, it simplifies how you track, analyze, and respond to market movements.

    Our platform introduces a powerful alert system, allowing users to monitor up to 10 token addresses on a single dashboard and set fully customizable price alerts with personalized MP3 sound notifications — ensuring you never miss any critical move.

    + Support: support@hvbsai.com
